name: Crunchy Fudge Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the peanut butter and butterscotch chips in a pan over low heat.
2. Stir in the Rice Krispies until evenly coated.
3. Press half of the mixture into a buttered, 9 x 9 pan.
4. Chill the pan for about 15 minutes to set the layer.
5. In a double boiler or microwave-safe bowl, combine sugar, butter, and water.
6. Heat until the sugar dissolves completely.
7. Add chocolate chips and stir until melted and smooth.
8. Spread the melted chocolate mixture evenly over the chilled Rice Krispies layer.
9. Top with the remaining Rice Krispies mixture.
10. Allow to cool at room temperature before cutting into squares.
